title: Oil surpasses $100 due to Houthi attacks and escalation with Iran, unleashing a global energy crisis
summary: Crude oil reaches $100 for the first time since May after Houthi attacks on Saudi ships and the intensification of the conflict with Iran, triggering massive sell-offs in financial markets and a rise in bond yields globally.

title: ECB keeps interest rates at 2.25% and anticipates a hike in September
summary: The European Central Bank left rates unchanged but warned that an increase in September is likely due to the persistent energy crisis.

title: ECB opens public consultation to choose design of new euro banknotes
summary: Citizens will be able to give their opinion on possible motifs such as Beethoven, Cervantes or a bird, and the final decision will be made in the coming months.

title: Wall Street closes with heavy losses due to collapse of tech stocks
summary: The Dow Jones fell more than 600 points, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq recorded significant declines in Thursday's session.

title: EU agrees new sanctions against Russia without including ban on seafood or gas
summary: The twenty-first sanctions package excludes seafood imports and exempts Russian gas shipments.

title: Strategies to bet on a rise in the S&P 500
summary: The publications Expansion and Financial Times offer strategies to be bullish on the S&P 500.

title: Distressed private credit funds represent an opportunity for secondary investors
summary: Investors can acquire these assets at a discount in the secondary market to obtain attractive returns.
